name: Pilafi Me Saltsa Domata (Pilaf W/Tomato S
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onions in half the butter until they turn a light-golden color.
2. Add the garlic and cook until soft, but not browned.
3. Stir in the tomatoes, celery, parsley, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 1/2 hour.
4. Pass the sauce through a strainer or puree it in a blender, then return it to the pot.
5. Cook the sauce until thickened.
6. Prepare the rice according to package directions.
7. Brown the remaining butter and pour it over the rice, mixing well.
8. Pack the rice into a mold and turn it out onto a platter.
9. Serve hot with the sauce poured over the rice.
